reasoning_content:
It uses `$ENV{YatCC_LLVM_DIR}` or falls back to `${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/llvm` which is `/workspace/YatCC/llvm`. So `YATCC_LLVM_DIR` = `/workspace/YatCC/llvm` and `TASK5_LLVM_RISCV_GEN_DIR` = `${YATCC_LLVM_DIR}/task5/include` = `/workspace/YatCC/llvm/task5/include`. Let me verify the generated files exist there.

We already confirmed `/workspace/YatCC/llvm/task5/include/RISCVGenRegisterInfo.inc` exists. Let me try building again.
